stocks.impact_theory: Recent announcement of new Blackwell AI chip with 2x performance gains amid surging demand for AI infrastructure. Economic implications include accelerated data center spending by hyperscalers. Market psychology: FOMO buying from retail and institutions fearing missing AI wave. Historical parallels: Similar to 2023 Hopper GPU launch which drove 200% rally. Analogies: Like oil boom fueling energy stocks in 1970s; rocket fuel for AI revolution.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches show headlines like 'Nvidia crushes Q4 earnings, AI revenue up 125%'. X sentiment 85% positive with #NVDA trending, posts praising chip dominance over AMD.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy on dip targeting $320 (+12%), potential 15% gain in week.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short above $310 if overbought, but risky.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Chip supply chain disruptions, US-China trade tensions, valuation bubble burst.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat, high X volume positive, historical pattern holds.
